questionHtml:
Which property of DNA explains how genetic information can be replicated accurately?


A.  Complementary base pairing

B.  The double helical shape

C.  5’ – 3’ bonding in the sugar-phosphate backbone

D.  The ability of DNA to bind to histones

meta.title: Which property of DNA explains how genetic information can be replicated accurately? A. Complementary base pairing B. The double helical shape C. 5’ – 3’ bonding in the sugar-phosp
breadcrumbLabels: A1.2.8. Role of complementary base pairing in allowing genetic information to be replicated and expressed
